use_cases: Modal or drawer overlays that close via downward drag gesture
Clean modal dialogs with smooth open/close animations
E-commerce or app interfaces needing intuitive touch interactions
ai_summary: A draggable modal/drawer component that allows users to close the overlay by dragging the handle downward past a threshold. Built with Framer Motion for smooth physics-based animations and React state management. Features a clean flat design with Tailwind CSS styling, an open button trigger, and drag-to-close functionality as the primary interaction pattern.
